UNITRADING.Especiais:
=_xlfn.LET(
    _xlpm.cliente,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Cliente Proposta]],
    _xlpm.embarcador,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Embarcador]],
    _xlpm.destinatario,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Destinatário]],
    _xlpm.provedor,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Provedor]],
    _xlpm.porto,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Porto]],
    _xlpm.produto,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Produto]],
    _xlpm.clientePorto,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Cliente Proposta+PortoExc]],
    _xlpm.embCliProv,ROE_wk[[#This Row],[Embarcador+Cliente Proposta+ProvedorExc]],
    _xlpm.especialClientePorto,IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(_xlpm.clientePorto,Exceptions!AI:AI,Exceptions!AJ:AJ,""),""),
    _xlpm.especialEmbCliProv,IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(_xlpm.embCliProv,Exceptions!V:V,Exceptions!W:W,""),""),
    _xlpm.textoRegra,_xlpm.embarcador&"|"&_xlpm.cliente,
    _xlpm.ehFrotaMaersk,LEFT(_xlpm.provedor,6)="MAERSK",
    _xlpm.ehCabotagem,_xlpm.produto="Cab",
    _xlpm.especialEscopoNovo,OR(
        NOT(ISERROR(FIND("COTRIGUACU COOPERATIVA CENTRAL",_xlpm.textoRegra))),
        NOT(ISERROR(FIND("PLUSVAL AGROAVICOLA LTDA",_xlpm.textoRegra))),
        NOT(ISERROR(FIND("CVALE COOPERATIVA AGROINDUSTRIAL",_xlpm.textoRegra))),
        NOT(ISERROR(FIND("COPACOL",_xlpm.textoRegra))),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("MULTILIT FIBROCIMENTO LTDA",_xlpm.textoRegra))),_xlpm.provedor="VALE DO TIBAGI TRANSPORTES E LOGISTICA L"),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("CRISTAL MASTER",_xlpm.textoRegra))),_xlpm.ehFrotaMaersk),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("NIDEC GLOBAL APPLIANCE BRASIL LTDA",_xlpm.textoRegra))),_xlpm.ehFrotaMaersk),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("SUMITOMO RUBBER DO BRASIL LTDA",_xlpm.textoRegra))),_xlpm.ehFrotaMaersk),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("BMW DO BRASIL LTDA",_xlpm.textoRegra))),_xlpm.ehFrotaMaersk),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("WESTROCK",_xlpm.textoRegra))),_xlpm.ehCabotagem),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("MARIO JOSE WERNER & CIA LTDA",_xlpm.textoRegra))),_xlpm.porto="Itajai"),
        AND(NOT(ISERROR(FIND("PROCTER",_xlpm.cliente))),LEFT(_xlpm.provedor,3)="IRB",_xlpm.porto="Rio"),
        AND(_xlpm.cliente="VOLKSWAGEN TRUCK E BUS INDUSTRIA E COMER",_xlpm.provedor="IRB LOGISTICA S.A.",_xlpm.porto="Rio"),
        AND(_xlpm.cliente="AJINOMOTO DO BRASIL INDUSTRIA E COMERCIO",_xlpm.provedor="UNITRADING LOGISTICA IMPORTACAO E EXPORT",_xlpm.porto="Santos")
    ),
    _xlpm.especialLegado,OR(
        _xlpm.cliente="SAMSUNG SDS GLOBAL SCL LATIN AMERICA LOG",
        _xlpm.cliente="SAMSUNG SDS LATIN AMERICA TECNOLOGIA  E",
        AND(_xlpm.cliente="NOVELIS DO BRASIL LTDA",OR(_xlpm.embarcador="BALL BEVERAGE CAN SOUTH AMERICA SA",_xlpm.embarcador="BALL BEVERAGE CAN SOUTH AMERICA LTDA")),
        AND(_xlpm.cliente="NOVELIS DO BRASIL LTDA",_xlpm.destinatario="ADUKARGO TRANSPORTES LOGISTICA ESERVICOS"),
        _xlpm.cliente="LG ELECTRONICS DO BRASIL LTDA",
        _xlpm.cliente="LG DISTRIBUIDORA DE UTILIDADES LTDA",
        _xlpm.cliente="ELGIN SA",
        _xlpm.cliente="ELGIN INDUSTRIAL DA AMAZONIA LTDA",
        _xlpm.cliente="VIDEOLAR SA",
        _xlpm.cliente="VIDEOLAR INNOVA SA",
        _xlpm.cliente="PHILCO ELETRONICOS SA",
        _xlpm.cliente="VALGROUP AM INDUSTRIA DE MASTERBATCH LTD",
        _xlpm.cliente="VALGROUP AM INDUSTRIA DE EMBALAGENS FLEX",
        _xlpm.cliente="VALGROUP BRASIL III INDUSTRIA DE EMBALAG",
        _xlpm.cliente="ELECTROLUX DO BRASIL SA",
        _xlpm.destinatario="CONSULADO GERAL AMERICANO NO RIO DE JANE",
        _xlpm.cliente="MAERSK A/S"
    ),
    IF(OR(_xlpm.especialClientePorto="S",_xlpm.especialEmbCliProv="S",_xlpm.especialEscopoNovo,_xlpm.especialLegado),"Especial","")
)
UNITRADING.Is_OTOException:
=_xlfn.LET(
    _xlpm.tipo, "OTO",

    _xlpm.motivo, BT4,
    _xlpm.cliente, BU4,
    _xlpm.provedor, BZ4,
    _xlpm.cpbrand, BV4,
    _xlpm.cpporto, BW4,
    _xlpm.embcliprov, BX4,
    _xlpm.embcliprovporto, CC4,
    _xlpm.embprovportobrand, K4&D4&AY4&AI4,
    _xlpm.emblocal, BY4,

    _xlpm.os, A4,
    _xlpm.buSil, IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(_xlpm.os, SIL_wk!B:B, SIL_wk!A:A, ""), ""),
    _xlpm.tipoProgSil, IFERROR(_xlfn.XLOOKUP(_xlpm.os, SIL_wk!B:B, SIL_wk!F:F, ""), ""),

    _xlpm.mt, Exceptions_Mapping[MatchType],
    _xlpm.mv, Exceptions_Mapping[MatchValue],
    _xlpm.tp, Exceptions_Mapping[ExceptionType],

    _xlpm.vetorMotivo, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Justificativa"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorCliente, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Cliente Proposta"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorProv, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Provedor"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorCPBrand, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Cliente Proposta+Brand"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorCPPorto, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Cliente Proposta+Porto"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorEmbCliProv, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Embarcador+Cliente Proposta+Provedor"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorEmbCliProvPorto, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Embarcador+Cliente Proposta+Provedor+Porto"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorEmbProvPortoBrand, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Embarcador+Provedor+Porto+Brand"), _xlpm.mv, ""),
    _xlpm.vetorEmbLocal, IF((_xlpm.tp=_xlpm.tipo)*(_xlpm.mt="Embarcador+Nome local de atendimento"), _xlpm.mv, ""),

    OR(
        AND(_xlpm.motivo<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.motivo, _xlpm.vetorMotivo))),
        AND(_xlpm.cliente<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.cliente, _xlpm.vetorCliente))),
        AND(_xlpm.provedor<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.provedor, _xlpm.vetorProv))),
        AND(_xlpm.cpbrand<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.cpbrand, _xlpm.vetorCPBrand))),
        AND(_xlpm.cpporto<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.cpporto, _xlpm.vetorCPPorto))),
        AND(_xlpm.embcliprov<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.embcliprov, _xlpm.vetorEmbCliProv))),
        AND(_xlpm.embcliprovporto<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.embcliprovporto, _xlpm.vetorEmbCliProvPorto))),
        AND(_xlpm.embprovportobrand<>"", COUNTIFS(Exceptions_Mapping[ExceptionType], _xlpm.tipo, Exceptions_Mapping[MatchType], "Embarcador+Provedor+Porto+Brand", Exceptions_Mapping[MatchValue], _xlpm.embprovportobrand)>0),
        AND(_xlpm.emblocal<>"", ISNUMBER(_xlfn.XMATCH(_xlpm.emblocal, _xlpm.vetorEmbLocal))),
        AND(_xlpm.cliente="CATERPILLAR BRASIL LTDA", _xlpm.buSil="SSZ", _xlpm.tipoProgSil="Importação")
    )
)
